text: B2 RDS - Proxy - Why? @ i @ e * Opening and Closing Connections consume resources e ....It takes time .. which creates latency * With serverless .. every lambda opens and closes ? e Handling failure of Database instances is hard ... » .. doing it within your application adds risks * DB Proxies help ... managing them is not trivial (scaling/resilience) e Application(s) => Proxy (connection pooling) => Database
